brand.name: Coach
brand.description: American leather goods house founded in New York City in 1941. Mass-accessible 'premium' tier (not luxury) under Tapestry, Inc. Most commonly found designer handbag brand at US thrift stores and Goodwill, making it a high-volume authentication and discovery target.

style.name: Tabby
style.description: The Tabby traces to a 1970s-era design lineage associated with legendary Coach designer Bonnie Cashin, though the specific silhouette sold today is not a direct 1:1 reissue of a single original model -- sourcing on the exact original product is thin. Creative director Stuart Vevers relaunched the Tabby as a modern style in Fall 2019, and it became one of Coach's signature turn-lock bags, sold in multiple sizes (commonly 26 and Shoulder Bag configurations) and many limited-edition material/print collaborations.
style.notes: year_introduced=1976 reflects the design lineage cited by fashion press (Bonnie Cashin era); this is less firmly verified than the 2019 relaunch date, which is corroborated by multiple sources. Treat 1976 as approximate/contextual, not a confirmed first-production year for an item called 'Tabby'.

variants.strap_type: both (detachable short strap and detachable long strap)
variants.interior_material: fabric lining (varies by version; some leather versions use suede lining)
variants.authentication_markers: Turn-lock should feel solid/heavy, not hollow or light; engraving on hardware should be clean, centered, and deep, not shallow or blurry. Dimensions approx 10.25" (L) x 5.5"-6.75" (H) x 2.75"-4.25" (D) depending on material/version. Detachable long strap drop commonly cited around 21"-21.5", short strap drop around 7".
variants.notes: Price ($475) and dimensions pulled from current coach.com / retailer listings as of research date; Coach frequently runs limited print/material collabs under the same 'Tabby Shoulder Bag 26' name with different SKUs (e.g. CH857, CI032, CP150, CW620), so exact dimensions/price vary slightly by specific drop. This record represents the standard leather version.

variants.size_label: Tabby Shoulder Bag 26 in Signature Canvas
variants.exterior_material: coated canvas (signature canvas) with calf leather trim
variants.exterior_colorway: Signature jacquard print, varies by season
variants.strap_type: both (detachable short strap and detachable long strap)
variants.authentication_markers: Combines signature coated canvas with refined calf leather trim; features inside zip and multifunction pockets, snap closure, outside slip pocket. Detachable short strap 7" drop, detachable long strap 21" drop. Dimensions approx 10.25" (L) x 5.5" (H) x 2.75" (W).
variants.notes: Retail price for this specific canvas SKU (CI032) not confirmed in research; left null rather than guessed.

carry_methods.notes: Via detachable long strap, commonly cited drop of approximately 21"-21.5" (53-55cm), suitable for crossbody wear.
Via detachable short strap, approximately 7" (17.8cm) drop, for shoulder/handheld carry.
Top handle / hand-carry possible when straps are detached, per product description of the Tabby's multi-carry design.

fits.notes: Not independently verified from a review/measurement source; not stated explicitly in research found.
Bag width (~2.75"-4.25" depth) suggests an iPad Mini would not fit flat through the opening, but this was not explicitly confirmed by a source, so left unverified rather than guessed.
Not independently verified from a source.

interior_storage.material: fabric or suede lining depending on version
interior_storage.authentication_notes: Described as 'inside zip and multifunction pockets' on canvas version; configuration may vary slightly by material/SKU.

interior_storage.placement: interior / exterior (turnlock and open pockets noted on some versions)
interior_storage.authentication_notes: Leather Tabby Turnlock Medium version described with outside turn-lock and open pockets plus 1 interior snap pocket and 1 interior zip pocket with suede lining.

serial_tags.format: Vintage/older format: two-letter factory or inspector code, slash, numeric style number, slash, two-digit year (e.g. LD/123/85). Modern format (circa 2020+): Coach moved to alphanumeric style numbers (letter + four-digit sequence, e.g. CH857), and around 2014 began phasing out stamped date codes on the creed patch entirely -- many current creed patches show only the authenticity paragraph with no numbers underneath, with style/factory info moved to a separate fabric tag sewn into the lining.
serial_tags.placement: Interior leather (or fabric, in modern bags) patch/tag sewn or stamped inside the bag, typically near the lining.
serial_tags.material: Stamped or blind-embossed leather patch (vintage); printed fabric tag (modern)
serial_tags.year_range: Vintage format roughly pre-1994; transitional formats through the 2010s; current alphanumeric style-number format from approximately 2020 onward
serial_tags.how_to_read: Vintage: first two letters = factory/inspector code, middle number = style number, final two digits = year of production. Modern (2020+): style numbers follow patterns such as Letter+4 digits (e.g. CH857), or Letter+4digits-Letter+4digits, or with suffixes -- an 'F' after a hyphen indicates a Factory/outlet-exclusive bag; 'M' indicates Macy's exclusive; 'N' indicates Nordstrom exclusive.
serial_tags.authentication_notes: Stamping should be clean, even, and crisp -- blurry or inconsistent fonts are a red flag. Placement should be in the standard designated area (commonly bottom center or corner of the patch); placement outside the norm is suspect. The patch itself should be genuine material with proper stitching; irregular leather or sloppy stitching suggests counterfeit. NOTE: exact current-day (2026) format for newly produced Tabby bags specifically was not independently confirmed beyond the general 2020-era pattern described above -- treat as medium confidence, not a Tabby-specific verified format.

locks_and_keys.authentication_notes: The Tabby's closure is an integrated turn-lock (or snap closure on canvas versions), not a separate padlock-and-key system. No source found indicating Coach Tabby ships with a lock/key set. A separate padlock accessory on a Tabby would be inconsistent with the style.

provenance_packaging.description: Coach dust bag included with new purchase, standard practice across the brand's current product lines.
provenance_packaging.material: Fabric (non-woven or flannel-style, consistent with Coach's general packaging practice)
provenance_packaging.branding: Coach logo/wordmark, exact current design not independently confirmed for Tabby specifically
provenance_packaging.authentication_notes: Dust bag presence/absence does not by itself authenticate a bag; specific design/branding details not verified in this research pass.
